core_principles.title: No Pure Technical Indicator Rules
core_principles.description: Single OHLCV threshold rules are not sufficient. H001-H012 proved this. Every hypothesis needs structural economic rationale.

core_principles.title: Stronger Prior Required
core_principles.description: At least one structural prior required per hypothesis.

core_principles.title: Economic Rationale First
core_principles.description: Write WHY the signal should exist before designing features. Rationale must be written before feature design.

core_principles.title: PIT-Safe Feature Definition Required
core_principles.description: All features provably computable from information available at signal time. Enforced by point_in_time_guard.

core_principles.title: Minimum Sample Size Defined Before Testing
core_principles.description: Minimum signals estimated upfront. If expected density x universe < 50 signals, hypothesis cannot be tested.

core_principles.title: Required OOS Windows Specified
core_principles.description: Minimum OOS window 250 days. In-sample results cannot be used for promotion.

core_principles.title: Permutation plus BH-FDR Required for Promotion
core_principles.description: Every hypothesis requires permutation test (>=500 shuffles) AND BH-FDR. Positive ROI alone is NOT edge.

core_principles.title: Retirement Rule Specified Upfront
core_principles.description: Each hypothesis defines retirement conditions before testing. If conditions met, retire regardless of partial positive results.

core_principles.title: No Threshold Change From Results
core_principles.description: Thresholds set from economic rationale only, never from observed p-values. Enforced by hypothesis_refinement_guard.

core_principles.title: Human Review Required Before Production
core_principles.description: No automated production promotion. human_review_required=true enforced in registry.

scoring_rubric.description: Hypothesis Quality Score 0-100. Minimum 70 required to enter validation.

dimensions.name: economic_rationale_strength
dimensions.description: Clear testable economic rationale explaining why signal should exist

dimensions.name: feature_pit_safety
dimensions.description: All features provably computable from data available at signal time

dimensions.name: universe_suitability
dimensions.description: Eligible universe large enough for statistical testing

dimensions.name: expected_signal_density
dimensions.description: How frequently signal is expected to occur

dimensions.name: testability_reproducibility
dimensions.description: Can be reproduced by others with all parameters precisely defined

forbidden_actions: Using single OHLCV threshold as entire hypothesis
Adjusting thresholds based on observed p-values
Promoting based on positive ROI alone
